recipe.description: Acorn squash is the worst thing ever to peel and cube, butternut squash is a great substitute. I'm going to try this with unpeeled acorn squash, since you can eat the peel
recipe.notes: Tags: Main, Instant Pot, pork roast, peppers, celery, acorn squash, mushrooms
recipe.title: Crock Pot pork & Veggies

steps.instruction: Add all ingredients to a gallon freezer bag. Freeze.
Thaw overnight. Place contents in slowcooker. Cook on low, 6-8 hours.
Could serve with bread, salad, baked potato, etc., or over roasted potatoes.
